SEARCH
Package com.apigee.openapi.converter.model

Class Flow

java.lang.Object
com.apigee.openapi.converter.model.Flow
public class Flow extends Object
Represents an Apigee Flow configuration. A flow can be a PreFlow, PostFlow, or a conditional flow.
